creator: meka@tilda.center
text: When defined, LICENSE_FILE will cause LICENSE.md to be copied to /usr/local. I though we should always put that variable in Makefile of the port. Of course, once removed, everything is just fine. What should I do for this port and for any other in case license is standard (in this case BSD3CLAUSE) and when it's non-standard one? Of course, I will adjust this port based on the feedback. Thank you!
